description: Enable serde_json preserve_order feature so JSON output keys match model member order (matching AWS CLI output)

verify.expect: Keys in order: UserId, Account, Arn (not alphabetical)

notes: Session 8: Added preserve_order feature to serde_json. XML protocol parsers already iterated model members in order, so this was sufficient.

description: Normalize timestamps to AWS CLI format: ISO 8601 with +00:00 offset, no .000 milliseconds, epoch seconds converted to ISO strings
notes: Session 8: Added normalize_timestamp() and epoch_to_iso() in protocol/mod.rs. XML parsers normalize during parse, JSON/REST-JSON use model-aware post-processing walk in driver.rs.

description: Strip pagination-related fields (output_token, more_results) from single-page auto-paginated responses to match AWS CLI

verify.expect: No IsTruncated or Marker fields in output

notes: Session 8: Fixed merge_pages to strip output_token and more_results fields even for single-page results.

description: JSON and REST-JSON protocol responses should have keys in model member order (not API response order)

verify.expect: Keys match AWS CLI output order
Keys match AWS CLI output order

notes: JSON/REST-JSON responses currently use API response key order, which may differ from model order

description: JSON protocol epoch timestamps (numbers) are converted to ISO 8601 strings matching AWS CLI format

verify.expect: Epoch numbers converted to ISO strings

notes: Session 8: normalize_timestamps_in_value walks model shapes and converts timestamp numbers to ISO strings

description: Auto-paginated responses only include result_key and non_aggregate_keys fields (strip all other response fields like KeyCount)

verify.expect: Only Keys in output, no KeyCount or Truncated

notes: Currently strips output_token and more_results but keeps other non-result-key fields like KeyCount

description: Omit empty lists and null values from output when the AWS CLI omits them

verify.run: diff <(cargo run -- s3api list-buckets --region us-east-1 2>&1) <(aws s3api list-buckets --region us-east-1 2>&1)

notes: S3 list-buckets: AWS CLI includes Prefix:null that raws omits. Need to investigate per-service behavior.

description: Text output format (--output text) matches AWS CLI exactly for common operations

verify.run: diff <(cargo run -- sts get-caller-identity --output text 2>&1) <(aws sts get-caller-identity --output text 2>&1)

description: Table output format (--output table) matches AWS CLI exactly for common operations

verify.run: diff <(cargo run -- sts get-caller-identity --output table 2>&1) <(aws sts get-caller-identity --output table 2>&1)

description: Error messages for common failures match AWS CLI format and exit codes

verify.run: cargo run -- s3api get-object --bucket nonexistent-bucket --key test --region us-east-1 2>&1; echo $?
verify.expect: Error message and exit code match AWS CLI

description: Help text (--help) for services and operations is generated from model documentation
--no-paginate flag bypasses auto-pagination and shows raw API response

verify.expect: Shows raw response including Truncated field
